scripts.icons:pwa: npx --yes sharp-cli -i public/icons/pwa-icon-source.png -o public/icons/icon-192.webp resize 192 192 --fit contain --background rgb(14,20,25) -f webp -q 90 --effort 6 && npx --yes sharp-cli -i public/icons/pwa-icon-source.png -o public/icons/icon-512.webp resize 512 512 --fit contain --background rgb(14,20,25) -f webp -q 90 --effort 6 && npx --yes sharp-cli -i public/icons/pwa-icon-source.png -o public/icons/header-icon.webp resize 50 50 --fit contain --background rgb(14,20,25) -f webp -q 90 --effort 6
scripts.build:android:capacitor:init: yarn build:capacitor && npx cap init "Escudo Mestre" "com.escudo.mestre" --web-dir=out && npx cap add android
scripts.build:android:capacitor: yarn build:capacitor && npx cap sync android && npx cap build android -- --release
